49 g of a non-volatile solute (molar mass = 122 g/mol) is dissolved in 250 mL of water. Assuming ideal behaviour and solvent density of 1 g/mL, calculate the relative lowering of vapour pressure.
questions.solution: Moles solute = 49/122 = 0.402. Moles water = 250/18 = 13.89. Mole fraction = 0.02811.
